entities.description: Specifies support for cube texture resources (value: 0x80)

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT1_SHADER_LOAD
entities.description: 值：0x100。支持纹理对象的HLSL Load函数。

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT1_SHADER_SAMPLE_MONO_TEXT
entities.description: Specifies that the format supports shader sampling as mono text (value: 0x800). Reserved flag.

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT1_MIP
entities.description: Value: 0x1000. Indicates support for Mipmap textures.

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT1_BLENDABLE
entities.description: 该常量值为0x8000，表示支持混合操作(blending)。

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT1_DISPLAY
entities.description: 值为0x80000，表示该格式支持在屏幕上显示。

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT1_MULTISAMPLE_RENDERTARGET
entities.description: 值：0x200000。表示该格式可用作多采样渲染目标。

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT1_SHADER_GATHER
entities.description: 值：0x800000，表示格式可以与 HLSL gather 函数一起使用

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT1_DECODER_OUTPUT
entities.description: Specifies that the format can be used with decoder output. Value: 0x8000000

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT1_VIDEO_PROCESSOR_INPUT
entities.description: 值：0x20000000。格式可以与视频处理器输入一起使用。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 D3D12_FEATURE_DATA_FORMAT_SUPPORT 结构使用。

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAGS
entities.description: Specifies heap flags for Direct3D 12 resource creation.
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_HEAP_FLAGS {   D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_NONE = 0,

members.name: SizeInBytes
members.description: 堆的大小（以字节为单位）。 为了避免浪费内存，应用程序应传递 SizeInBytes 值，这些值是有效 Alignment 的倍数;但是，为了方便起见，也支持不对齐 SizeInBytes。 若要了解堆的大小必须多大，才能支持具有未定义 的布局和适配器特定大小的纹理，请调用 ID3D12Device：：GetResourceAllocationInfo。 Properties 描述堆属性的 D3D12_HEAP_PROPERTIES 结构。 Alignment 堆的对齐值。 有效值： 价值 0

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2
entities.description: 指定所提供的格式支持哪些无序资源选项的枚举。
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2 {   D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2_NONE = 0,

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2_UAV_ATOMIC_ADD
entities.description: Value: 0x1. Indicates format supports atomic add operations in UAVs.

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2_UAV_ATOMIC_COMPARE_STORE_OR_COMPARE_EXCHANGE
entities.description: Indicates the format supports UAV atomic compare store or compare exchange operations

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2_UAV_ATOMIC_SIGNED_MIN_OR_MAX
entities.description: Indicates support for UAV atomic operations with signed min/max on the format

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2_UAV_TYPED_LOAD
entities.description: Indicates support for typed UAV loads (value = 0x40)

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2_OUTPUT_MERGER_LOGIC_OP
entities.description: Indicates support for output merger logic operations (value: 0x100)

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2_MULTIPLANE_OVERLAY
entities.description: Indicates support for multiplane overlay format.

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2_NONE
entities.description: 值为0，表示不支持任何无序资源选项。

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2_UAV_ATOMIC_EXCHANGE
entities.description: 值为0x8，表示格式支持UAV(Unordered Access View)原子交换操作

entities.name: D3D12_FORMAT_SUPPORT2_TILED
entities.description: 值：0x200，表示格式支持平铺资源。请参阅卷平铺资源。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 D3D12_FEATURE_DATA_FORMAT_SUPPORT 结构使用。

entities.name: AccessAfter
entities.description: 指定屏障完成后与任何相关资源使用情况对应的访问位

entities.name: D3D12_GPU_VIRTUAL_ADDRESS_AND_S
entities.description: 表示 GPU 虚拟地址和索引步长。
entities.syntax: typedef struct D3D12_GPU_VIRTUAL_ADDRESS_AND_STRIDE {

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_PIPELINE_STATE_DES
entities.description: 描述图形管道状态对象的结构体。
entities.syntax: typedef struct D3D12_GRAPHICS_PIPELINE_STATE_DESC {   ID3D12RootSignature                *pRootSignature;

entities.name: D3D12_SHADER_BYTECODE
entities.description: 描述着色器字节码的结构体，包含指向着色器数据的指针和其长度
entities.syntax:
typedef struct D3D12_SHADER_BYTECODE {
const void *pShaderBytecode;   SIZE_T     BytecodeLength;} D3D12_SHADER_BYTECODE;

members.name: pShaderBytecode
members.description: 指向包含着色器数据的内存块的指针。 BytecodeLength pShaderBytecode 成员指向的着色器数据的大小（以字节为单位）。

entities.name: D3D12_RASTERIZER_DESC
entities.description: Describes rasterizer state for a graphics pipeline. The runtime determines pipeline stream type (COMPUTE, GRAPHICS, or MESH) based on shader sub-object types (VS, CS, MS). Pipeline creation fails if required shaders are missing or multiple non-null shaders are found. Unrelated sub-object types are ignored. Default values are provided for unspecified sub-objects.
entities.syntax: typedef struct D3D12_RASTERIZER_DESC {

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_STATE_IA_VERTEX_BUFFERS
entities.description: 指定输入汇编程序阶段上顶点缓冲区绑定的状态。

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_STATE_RS_SCISSOR_RECTS
entities.description: Specifies scissor rectangles in the rasterizer state.

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_STATE_OM_RENDER_TARGETS
entities.description: Specifies the state of render targets bound to the output merger stage.

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_STATE_OM_DEPTH_BOUNDS
entities.description: Specifies depth bounds testing state in D3D12 graphics pipeline

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_STATE_NONE
entities.description: 值为0，表示不指定任何图形状态

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_STATE_COMPUTE_ROOT_SIGNATURE
entities.description: Specifies the state of the currently set compute root signature.

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_STATE_PIPELINE_STATE
entities.description: 指定图形管道状态对象的状态标志。

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_STATE_SO_TARGETS
entities.description: 指定绑定到流输出阶段的缓冲区视图的状态。

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_STATE_SAMPLE_POSITIONS
entities.description: 指定图形管线中样本位置的状态枚举。

entities.name: D3D12_GRAPHICS_STATE_VIEW_INSTANCE_MASK
entities.description: Specifies the view instance mask state in Direct3D 12 graphics pipeline.

entities.name: D3D12_DEFAULT_MSAA_RESOURCE_PLACEMENT_ALIGNMENT
entities.description: Default alignment for MSAA (Multisample Anti-Aliasing) resource placement in D3D12. Defined as 64KB or 4MB depending on resource type.
entities.remarks: Used by CreateHeap method and returned by GetDesc method to determine heap alignment requirements for MSAA resources.

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_SHARED
entities.description: 值：0x1 共享堆。请参阅共享堆。

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_DENY_BUFFERS
entities.description: Specifies that the heap cannot contain buffer resources

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_SHARED_CROSS_ADAPTER
entities.description: Specifies the heap is shared cross-adapter with value 0x20

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_DENY_NON_RT_DS_TEXTURES
entities.description: Specifies that the heap cannot contain non-render-target or non-depth-stencil textures unless they also have D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_RENDER_TARGET or D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_DEPTH_STENCIL flags set. Value: 0x80

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_HARDWARE_PROTECTED
entities.description: Specifies that the heap is hardware protected.

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_ALLOW_SHADER_ATOMICS
entities.description: 值为0x400。指定堆内存上的原子操作将保证原子性。创建具有此标志的堆将在以下条件下失败：1) 堆类型为D3D12_HEAP_TYPE_DEFAULT且在多节点上可见，但设备不支持D3D12_CROSS_NODE_SHARING_TIER_3；2) 堆是CPU可见的但堆类型不是D3D12_HEAP_TYPE_CUSTOM。注意：具有此标志的堆在某些系统上可能是有限资源。

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_ALLOW_ALL_BUFFERS_AND_TEXTURES
entities.description: Specifies that all buffer and texture resources can be created in the heap.

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_ALLOW_ONLY_NON_RT_DS_TEXTURES
entities.description: 值为0x44，表示堆只允许存储非RT(渲染目标)和非DS(深度模板)纹理。这是一个别名标志，详细信息请参考备注部分的'别名'说明。

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_ALLOW_ONLY_RT_DS_TEXTURES
entities.description: Specifies a heap that only allows render target and depth-stencil textures. Equivalent to combining D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_DENY_BUFFERS and D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_DENY_NON_RT_DS_TEXTURES flags.
entities.remarks: Used with ID3D12Device::CreateHeap and ID3D12Device::CreateCommittedResource. Must be used with ID3D12Device::CreateHeap but automatically set for implicit heaps created by CreateCommittedResource. Only supported on Tier 1 heaps.

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_DENY_RT_DS_TEXTURES
entities.description: Prevents usage with WriteToSubresource and ReadFromSubresource. Prevents subregion GPU copies. CopyTextureRegion must use this flag to copy entire subresources to/from resources.

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_DEPTH_STENCIL
entities.description: Specifies that the resource is a depth-stencil texture. When creating depth-stencil textures, choose the value most frequently used with clear operations.

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回 S_OK。 否则，它将返回 HRESULT错误代码。

entities.remarks: This flag is used by D3D12_RESOURCE_DESC structure to indicate depth-stencil resource capabilities.

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_DIMENSION_TEXTURE1D
entities.description: Specifies a 1D texture resource dimension type. Related to D3D12_RESOURCE_DIMENSION_TEXTURE2D and D3D12_RESOURCE_DIMENSION_TEXTURE3D, often used with D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_RENDER_TARGET or D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_DEPTH_STENCIL flags.

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_ALLOW_WRITE_WATCH
entities.description: Specifies the heap supports MEM_WRITE_WATCH functionality (value: 0x200). This causes the system to track pages written to committed memory regions. Cannot be used with D3D12_HEAP_TYPE_DEFAULT or D3D12_CPU_PAGE_PROPERTY_UNKNOWN flags. Not recommended for application use as it prevents tools from utilizing this feature.

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_CREATE_NOT_RESIDENT
entities.description: 值为0x800，表示堆在非驻留状态创建，必须使用ID3D12Device::MakeResident或ID3D12Device3::EnqueueMakeResident进行驻留。默认情况下堆创建的最后一步是使堆驻留，此标志跳过此步骤，允许应用程序决定何时执行此操作。

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_CREATE_NOT_ZEROED
entities.description: 值：0x1000。允许OS不零初始化创建的堆。默认情况下，创建时提交的资源和堆通常会被零初始化。此标志允许在某些场景中跳过此操作，但不能保证始终有效（例如来自其他进程的内存仍需零初始化以确保数据保护和进程隔离）。这可以降低创建堆的开销。

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_ALLOW_ONLY_BUFFERS
entities.description: Specifies the heap allows only buffer resources, equivalent to combining D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_DENY_RT_DS_TEXTURES and D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_DENY_NON_RT_DS_TEXTURES flags

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_RENDER_TARGET
entities.description: 值：0x1。允许为资源创建呈现目标视图，并使资源能够转换为D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_RENDER_TARGET状态。某些适配器架构会为此标志的纹理分配额外内存以减少渲染期间的带宽消耗。注意：对于从不用于渲染的纹理或BC压缩格式纹理，设置此标志可能无益。限制条件：1)纹理格式必须支持当前功能级别的渲染目标功能；2)对于无类型格式，同一无类型组中的格式必须支持渲染目标功能。

entities.name: SampleDesc
entities.description: 必须计数设置为1，质量设置为0。必须使用D3D12_TEXTURE_LAYOUT_UNKNOWN布局。D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_DEPTH_STENCIL和D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_CROSS_ADAPTER是无效的标志。

entities.name: VisibleNodeMask
entities.description: Must set bits specified in CreationNodeMask. VisibleNodeMask can also set additional bits for cross-node resources, but this may degrade resource access performance and should only be done when necessary. Passing zero is equivalent to passing one for simplicity with single GPU adapters.
entities.remarks: Used by Direct3D 12 multi-GPU configuration structures

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_TYPE_CUSTOM
entities.description: 抽象堆类型（DEFAULT、UPLOAD和READBACK）对于简化编写非适配器性应用程序非常有用。此类应用程序不需要了解适配器内存体系结构。使用抽象堆类型可简化编写非特定适配器的应用程序，应用程序将适配器视为离散或NUMA适配器。堆类型可为UMA适配器提供高效的转换。适配器体系结构中性应用程序应假定有两个可用内存池：具有最多GPU带宽的池无法提供CPU访问；具有最小GPU带宽的池可以具有CPU访问权限，但必须针对上传到GPU或从GPU进行读回进行优化。注意：纹理（与缓冲区不同）不能是堆类型UPLOAD或READBACK。

entities.name: CD3DX12_HEAP_PROPERTIES
entities.description: Direct3D 12 堆属性结构描述符

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_SERIALIZATION_TIER_0
entities.description: Indicates no heap serialization support

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_SERIALIZATION_TIER_10
entities.description: 值：10，指示支持堆序列化。应用程序可以通过CopyResource等API序列化堆中的资源数据，而无需对这些堆上的资源进行显式状态转换。

entities.name: D3D12_HEAP_TYPE_READBACK
entities.description: 值：3 指定用于回读的堆。 此堆类型具有针对从 GPU 中读取数据而优化的 CPU 访问，但不会体验 GPU 的最大带宽量。 此堆类型最适合 GPU-write-once、CPU 可读数据。 CPU 缓存行为是写回的，这有利于多个子缓存行 CPU 读取。 必须使用此堆中的资源创建 D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_COPY_DEST，并且无法从此更改。

entities.name: D3D12_HIT_GROUP_TYPE
entities.description: 指定命中组的类型枚举。包含以下可能值：D3D12_HIT_GROUP_TYPE_TRIANGLES等。
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_HIT_GROUP_TYPE {   D3D12_HIT_GROUP_TYPE_TRIANGLES = 0,

entities.name: D3D12_HIT_GROUP_TYPE_PROCEDURAL_PRIMITIVE
entities.description: 值为0x1，表示命中组使用边界框内的程序基元来计算光线命中数。使用过程基元的命中组必须包含交集着色器。

entities.name: D3D12_HIT_GROUP_TYPE_TRIANGLES
entities.description: 值为0，表示命中组使用三角形列表来计算光线命中数。使用三角形的命中组不能包含交集着色器。

entities.name: D3D12_HIT_KIND_TRIANGLE_FRONT_FACE
entities.description: Indicates a hit on the front face of a triangle in D3D12 ray tracing.

entities.name: D3D12_INDEX_BUFFER_STRIP_CUT_VALU
entities.description: 使用三角形带基元拓扑时，顶点位置被解释为连续三角形“带状”的顶点。 有一个特殊的索引值，表示希望条带中具有不连续性，即剪切索引值。 此枚举列出了支持的剪切值。

entities.name: D3D12_INDEX_BUFFER_STRIP_CUT_VALUE_DISABLED
entities.description: Specifies that no strip cut value is used for index buffers.

entities.name: D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_TYPE_DRAW_INDEXED
entities.description: Specifies the indirect argument type for indexed draw operations

entities.name: D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_TYPE_VERTEX_BUFFER_VIEW
entities.description: Specifies the indirect argument type is a vertex buffer view.

entities.name: D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_TYPE_CONSTANT_BUFFER_VIEW
entities.description: Specifies the type of indirect argument as a constant buffer view.

entities.name: D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_TYPE_DISPATCH_RAYS
entities.description: Specifies the indirect argument type for dispatch rays operations in Direct3D 12.

entities.name: D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_TYPE_DRAW
entities.description: Specifies the indirect argument type is a Draw call.

entities.name: D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_TYPE_DISPATCH
entities.description: Specifies the argument type is for a Dispatch call in Direct3D 12 indirect command execution.

entities.name: D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_TYPE_INDEX_BUFFER_VIEW
entities.description: Specifies the argument type is an index buffer view in Direct3D 12 indirect commands.

entities.name: D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_TYPE_CONSTANT
entities.description: Specifies the argument type is a constant in Direct3D 12 indirect commands.

entities.name: D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_TYPE_SHADER_RESOURCE_VIEW
entities.description: 指示类型是SRV（着色器资源视图）

entities.name: D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_TYPE_UNORDERED_ACCESS_VIEW
entities.description: 指示间接参数类型是无序访问视图(UAV)。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 D3D12_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT_DESC 结构使用。

entities.name: D3D12_INPUT_CLASSIFICATION_PER_INSTANCE_DATA
entities.description: 值为1，表示输入数据是每个实例的数据。
entities.remarks: 在 D3D12_INPUT_ELEMENT_DESC 结构的成员中指定其中一个值，以指定管道状态对象 的输入元素的数据类型。

entities.name: AlignedByteOffset
entities.description: 可选参数。指定从顶点开头到此元素的偏移量（以字节为单位）。用于顶点缓冲区的对齐偏移。

entities.name: D3D12_APPEND_ALIGNED_ELEMENT
entities.description: (0xffffffff) Specifies that the element should be aligned directly after the previous element, including any necessary packing.
entities.remarks: Used in D3D12_INPUT_ELEMENT_DESC structures to specify element alignment in vertex input layouts.

members.name: pInputElementDescs
members.description: 描述输入装配器阶段数据类型的 D3D12_INPUT_ELEMENT_DESC 结构的数组。 NumElements pInputElementDescs 成员指向的输入元素数组中的输入数据类型数。

entities.name: D3D12_LIFETIME_STATE_IN_USE
entities.description: 值为0，表示生存期跟踪对象正在使用中。与D3D12_LIFETIME_STATE_NOT_IN_USE相对，后者表示未使用生存期跟踪对象。

entities.name: D3D12_LOCAL_ROOT_SIGNATURE
entities.description: 定义将用于关联着色器的本地根签名状态子对象的结构。
entities.syntax: typedef struct D3D12_LOCAL_ROOT_SIGNATURE {   ID3D12RootSignature *pLocalRootSignature;} D3D12_LOCAL_ROOT_SIGNATURE;
entities.remarks: 状态对象中是否存在此子对象是可选的。 与任何给定着色器函数关联的全局和/或本地根签名的组合必须定义着色器 (声明的所有资源绑定，并且全局和本地根签名) 之间没有重叠。 如果调用图中的任何给定函数 (不对着色器表中的调用进行计数，) 与特定的本地根签名相关联，则图中的任何其他函数都必须与同一本地根签名关联或无关联，并且调用图) 根(着色器条目必须与本地根签名相关联。 这是因为，可从给定着色器条目访问的代码集从着色器记录中的着色器标识符调用，其中应用了一组本地根参数。 当然，不同的着色器可以使用不同的本地根签名 (，或者没有) ，因为它们的着色器标识符将位于不同的着色 器记录中。

members.name: pLocalRootSignature
members.description: 将充当本地根签名的根签名。 状态对象保存对此签名的引用。

entities.name: D3D12_LOGIC_OP
entities.description: 指定要为呈现器目标配置的逻辑操作的枚举类型
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_LOGIC_OP {   D3D12_LOGIC_OP_CLEAR = 0,

entities.name: D3D12_LOGIC_OP_SET
entities.description: D3D12_LOGIC_OP_COPY

entities.name: D3D12_LOGIC_OP_COPY_INVERTED
entities.description: 执行呈现目标的反转复制操作。

entities.name: D3D12_LOGIC_OP_NOOP
entities.description: Specifies the logical operation NOOP (no operation) for Direct3D 12 rendering.

entities.name: D3D12_LOGIC_OP_AND_REVERSE
entities.description: Logical AND operation with reverse operands (dest AND (NOT src))

entities.name: D3D12_LOGIC_OP_CLEAR
entities.description: 值：0。清除呈现目标(0)。D3D12_LOGIC_OP_SET设置呈现目标(1)。

entities.name: D3D12_LOGIC_OP_COPY
entities.description: Copy source from pixel shader output to render target.

entities.name: D3D12_LOGIC_OP_INVERT
entities.description: 反转呈现器目标 (~d)。

entities.name: D3D12_LOGIC_OP_AND
entities.description: 对呈现器目标(s & d)执行逻辑AND操作

entities.name: D3D12_MEASUREMENTS_ACTION_COMMIT_RESULTS_HIGH_PRIORITY
entities.description: 与 D3D12_MEASUREMENTS_ACTION_COMMIT_RESULTS 一样，但也指定应用程序不关心故障，因此运行时应忽略通常的空闲优先级规则，并继续使用尽可能多的线程，以便快速完成着色器重新编译。 仅在 开发人员模式下可用。

entities.name: D3D12_MEASUREMENTS_ACTION_DISCARD_PREVIOUS
entities.description: 指定应重置优化状态，提示之前测量过的任何操作不再适用

entities.name: D3D12_MEASUREMENTS_ACTION_KEEP_ALL
entities.description: 值为0的常量，默认设置。指定应保留所有测量结果。

entities.name: D3D12_MEASUREMENTS_ACTION_COMMIT_RESULTS
entities.description: 指示驱动程序已收集完所有需要的数据，应停止等待并继续编译优化着色器。

entities.name: D3D12_MEMORY_POOL_L0
entities.description: 值：1 内存池为 L0。 L0 是物理系统内存池。 当适配器是离散的/NUMA 时，此池的 CPU 带宽更大，GPU 的带宽更少。当适配器为 UMA 时，此池是唯一有效的池。

entities.name: D3D12_MEMORY_POOL_UNKNOWN
entities.description: Specifies an unknown memory pool type. Value: 0

entities.name: D3D12_MEMORY_POOL_L1
entities.description: 值为2，表示L1内存池。L1通常称为物理视频内存池，仅在离散/NUMA适配器上可用，GPU访问带宽更高且CPU无法访问。UMA适配器上不可用。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由D3D12_HEAP_PROPERTIES结构使用。当适配器为UMA时，应使用D3D12_MEMORY_POOL_L0。

entities.name: D3D12_MESH_SHADER_TIER_NOT_SUPPORTED
entities.description: 值为0，表示不支持网格着色器和放大着色器。

entities.name: D3D12_MESH_SHADER_TIER_1
entities.description: Specifies support for mesh shaders and amplification shaders (value: 10)

entities.name: InitializationDirtyState
entities.description: Specifies command list states modified by initialization meta-command calls. If all state bits are set, it's equivalent to calling ID3D12GraphicsCommandList::ClearState.

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER
entities.description: 描述元命令参数的结构体，包含参数名称、类型和标志
entities.syntax:
typedef struct D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_DESC {
LPCWSTR                            Name;   D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_TYPE  Type;   D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_FLAGS Flags;

entities.name: StructureOffset
entities.description: UINT类型参数，表示4字节对齐的偏移量，位于包含参数值的结构中，在创建/初始化/执行元命令时传递。

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_FLAG_INPUT
entities.description: 值为0x1，指定参数是输入资源

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_FLAG_OUTPUT
entities.description: 值为0x2，指定参数是输出资源

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_STAGE_INITIALIZATION
entities.description: 值为1，指定在元命令初始化阶段使用的参数。

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_STAGE_EXECUTION
entities.description: 值为2，指定在元命令执行阶段使用参数。

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_STAGE_CREATION
entities.description: Specifies that the parameter is used during the meta-command creation stage. Value: 0

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_TYPE_GPU_VIRTUAL_ADDRESS
entities.description: Specifies that the parameter is a GPU virtual address.

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_TYPE_FLOAT
entities.description: Specifies that the parameter type is FLOAT (value: 0).

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_TYPE_UINT64
entities.description: Specifies that the parameter type is UINT64 (value: 1)

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_TYPE_CPU_DESCRIPTOR_HANDLE_HEAP_TYPE_CBV_SRV_UAV
entities.description: 值为3，指定参数是包含常量缓冲区视图(CBV)、着色器资源视图(SRV)或无序访问视图(UAV)的堆的CPU描述符句柄。

entities.name: D3D12_META_COMMAND_PARAMETER_TYPE_GPU_DESCRIPTOR_HANDLE_HEAP_TYPE_CBV_SRV_UAV
entities.description: Specifies the parameter is a GPU descriptor handle for a heap containing Constant Buffer View (CBV), Shader Resource View (SRV) or Unordered Access View (UAV). Value: 4

entities.name: D3D12_MIP_REGION
entities.description: Describes the dimensions of a mip region in a resource.

members.name: Width
members.description: mip 区域的宽度。 Height mip 区域的高度。 Depth mip 区域的深度。

entities.name: D3D12_MULTIPLE_FENCE_WAIT_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: Specifies no special flags for multiple fence waiting.

entities.name: D3D12_MULTIPLE_FENCE_WAIT_FLAG_ALL
entities.description: 值为0，是D3D12_MULTIPLE_FENCE_WAIT_FLAG_NONE的别名，表示使用默认行为并等待所有围栏。
entities.remarks: SetEventOnMultipleFenceCompletion 方法使用此枚举。

entities.name: D3D12_MULTIPLE_FENCE_WAIT_FLAG_ANY
entities.description: 值为0x1，表示当任何一个围栏值到达其对应的信号值时就会触发信号

entities.name: D3D12_MULTISAMPLE_QUALITY_LEVEL
entities.description: 指定多采样质量级别的选项标志

entities.name: D3D12_MULTISAMPLE_QUALITY_LEVELS_FLAG_TILED_RESOURCE
entities.description: 值为0x1，表示可以确定平铺资源的质量级别数。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 D3D12_FEATURE_DATA_MULTISAMPLE_QUALITY_LEVELS 结构使用。

entities.name: D3D12_MULTISAMPLE_QUALITY_LEVELS_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: Specifies no multisample quality level flags are supported.

entities.name: D3D12_NODE_MASK
entities.description: 结构体类型，用于标识应用状态对象的GPU节点掩码。
entities.remarks: 此子对象是可选的。 如果不存在状态对象，则状态对象将应用于所有可用节点。 如果节点掩码子对象已与状态对象的任何部分相关联，则必须对状态对象中的所有导出进行节点掩码关联， (包括导入的集合) ，并且引用的所有节点掩码子对象必须具有匹配的内容。 ） 重要 在某些版本的 DirectX 运行时上，在类型 为

entities.name: D3D12_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_NODE_MASK
entities.description: Specifies a node mask in D3D12_STATE_SUBOBJECT using D3D12_NODE_MASK. Runtime will incorrectly process node mask value 0 (should use node #1), causing errors when using the state object. Either specify explicit node value 1 or omit it.

entities.name: D3D12_PACKED_MIP_INFO
entities.description: 结构 描述具有 mipmap 的平铺资源的图块结构。

entities.name: NumStandardMips
entities.description: Specifies the number of standard mipmaps in a tiled resource. For array surfaces, this value indicates the number of packed mipmaps per array slice.

entities.name: CD3DX12_PACKED_MIP_INFO
entities.description: Direct3D 12 packed mipmap information structure

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_FLAG_TOOL_DEBUG
entities.description: Indicates pipeline state flag for tool debugging (value = 0x1)

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: Specifies no pipeline state flags are set. Value: 0

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_FLAG_DYNAMIC_DEPTH_BIAS
entities.description: 指示在使用 RSSetDepthBias 设置管道后，可以动态更改管道状态。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 D3D12_GRAPHICS_PIPELINE_STATE_DESC 和

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY
entities.description: Specifies the primitive topology subobject type in a Direct3D 12 pipeline state.

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYP
entities.description: 在管道状态流说明中指定子对象的类型。
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE {

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_ROOT_SIGNATURE
entities.description: Specifies the root signature subobject type with value 0. The corresponding subobject type is ID3D12RootSignature.

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_VS
entities.description: Specifies the vertex shader subobject type in a pipeline state stream description.

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_STREAM_OUTPUT
entities.description: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_STREAM_OUTPUT

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_SAMPLE_MASK
entities.description: Constant representing the sample mask subobject type in Direct3D 12 pipeline state

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_DEPTH_STENCIL
entities.description: , D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_INPUT_LAYOUT,

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_IB_STRIP_CUT_VALUE
entities.description: Specifies the index buffer strip cut value subobject type. The corresponding subobject type is D3D12_INDEX_BUFFER_STRIP_CUT_VALUE.

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_RENDER_TARGET_FORMATS
entities.description: 指示呈现器目标格式化子对象类型。 相应的子对象类型 是D3D12_RT_FORMAT_ARRAY 结构，它包装呈现目标格式的数组以及数组元素的计数。

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_SAMPLE_DESC
entities.description: Constant representing DXGI_SAMPLE_DESC subobject type in pipeline state

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_DEPTH_STENCIL1
entities.description: 指示扩展深度模具子对象类型。深度模具子对象的这种扩展支持可选的深度边界检查。相应的子对象类型为 D3D12_DEPTH_STENCIL_DESC1。

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_AS
entities.description: Pipeline state subobject type constant for Amplification Shader (AS)

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_PS
entities.description: 指示像素着色器子对象类型。 相应的子对象类型是 D3D12_SHADER_BYTECODE。

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_DS
entities.description: Specifies the domain shader subobject type. The corresponding subobject type is D3D12_SHADER_BYTECODE.

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_HS
entities.description: 指示外壳着色器子对象类型。 相应的子对象类型是 D3D12_SHADER_BYTECODE。

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_GS
entities.description: 指示几何着色器子对象类型。 相应的子对象类型是 D3D12_SHADER_BYTECODE。

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_CS
entities.description: 指示计算着色器子对象类型。对应的子对象类型是D3D12_SHADER_BYTECODE。

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_BLEND
entities.description: Indicates the blend subobject type. The corresponding subobject type is D3D12_BLEND_DESC.

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_RASTERIZER
entities.description: 指示光栅器子对象类型。相应的子对象类型是D3D12_RASTERIZER_DESC。

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_DEPTH_STENCIL_FORMAT
entities.description: Indicates the depth-stencil format subobject type.

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_NODE_MASK
entities.description: 指示节点掩码子对象类型。 相应的子对象类型为 D3D12_NODE_MASK 或 UINT。

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_CACHED_PSO
entities.description: 指示缓存的管道状态对象子对象类型。对应的子对象类型为D3D12_CACHED_PIPELINE_STATE。

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_FLAGS
entities.description: 指定管道状态子对象类型的标志枚举

entities.name: D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE_MS
entities.description: 值为25，指示网格着色器子对象类型。对应的子对象类型是D3D12_SHADER_BYTECODE。这是D3D12_PIPELINE_STATE_SUBOBJECT_TYPE枚举的一个成员。
entities.remarks: 此常量用于ID3D12Device1::CreatePipelineState方法创建管道状态对象时指定子对象类型。

entities.name: D3D12_PLACED_SUBRESOURCE_FOOTPR
entities.description: 描述已放置子资源的占用情况，包括偏移量和D3D12_SUBRESOURCE_FOOTPRINT。

entities.name: D3D12_SUBRESOURCE_FOOTPRINT
entities.description: Describes the footprint of a placed subresource.
entities.syntax: typedef struct D3D12_SUBRESOURCE_FOOTPRINT {

members.name: Offset
members.description: 父资源中子资源的偏移量（以字节为单位）。 父资源的起始位置与此子资源之间的偏移量。

entities.name: Footprint
entities.description: 描述子资源的格式、宽度、高度、深度和行间距，作为D3D12_SUBRESOURCE_FOOTPRINT结构
entities.remarks: 此结构在D3D12_TEXTURE_COPY_LOCATION结构中使用，由ID3D12Device::GetCopyableFootprints使用。占用空间结构引用的所有数据都必须位于父资源的边界内。

entities.name: D3D12_PREDICATION_OP_EQUAL_ZERO
entities.description: Value: 0 - Enables predication if all 64 bits are zero. Corresponds to D3D12_PREDICATION_OP_EQUAL_ZERO.
entities.remarks: Used by SetPredication. Predication is separate from queries. Predication can be set based on the value of 64 bits in a buffer.

entities.name: D3D12_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TYPE_POINT
entities.description: Specifies point primitive topology type (value = 1)

entities.name: D3D12_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TYPE_TRIANGLE
entities.description: Specifies that input primitives should be interpreted as triangles. Value: 3

entities.name: D3D12_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TYPE_PATCH
entities.description: Value: 4. Interpret input primitives as control point patches.
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 D3D12_GRAPHICS_PIPELINE_STATE_DESC 结构使用。

entities.name: D3D12_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TYPE_UNDEFINED
entities.description: Value: 0. Indicates the shader has not been initialized with an input primitive type. D3D12_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TYPE_POINT Value: 1. Input primitives are interpreted as points.

entities.name: D3D12_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TYPE_LINE
entities.description: Specifies that input primitives should be interpreted as lines (value: 2)

entities.name: TIONS_TIER
entities.description: 指定Direct3D 12适配器提供的可编程样本位置的支持级别。
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_PROGRAMMABLE_SAMPLE_POSITIONS_TIER {

entities.name: D3D12_PROGRAMMABLE_SAMPLE_POSITIONS_TIER_NOT_SUPPORTED
entities.description: 值为0，表示设备不支持可编程样本位置功能(D3D12_PROGRAMMABLE_SAMPLE_POSITIONS_TIER)

entities.name: D3D12_PROGRAMMABLE_SAMPLE_POSITIONS_TIER_1
entities.description: 值：1 指示对可编程样本位置有第1层支持。在第1层中，可以为每个像素指定单个示例模式（SetSamplePosition参数NumPixels=1），并且支持ResolveSubResource。

entities.name: D3D12_PROGRAMMABLE_SAMPLE_POSITIONS_TIER_2
entities.description: 值：2。表示支持第2层可编程样本位置功能。在第2层中，可以为2x2网格（SetSamplePosition参数NumPixels=4）中的每个像素指定四个单独的样本模式，该模式在渲染目标或视口上重复，均匀坐标对齐。

entities.name: N_DESC
entities.description: 标志位，用于描述每个适配器受保护的资源会话。

entities.name: ProtectionType
entities.description: GUID representing the protection type as defined by Microsoft

entities.name: D3D12_PROTECTED_RESOURCES_SESSION_HARDWARE_PROTECTED
entities.description: 使用D3D12_PROTECTED_RESOURCES_SESSION_HARDWARE_PROTECTED GUID等效于调用ID3D12Device4::CreateProtectedResourceSession。

entities.name: D3D12_PROTECTED_RESOURCE_SESSION_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: 值为0，表示不指定任何保护资源会话标志。

entities.name: D3D12_PROTECTED_RESOURCE_SESSION_SUPPORT_FLAG_SUPPORTED
entities.description: Flag value (0x1) indicating protected resource sessions are supported.

entities.name: D3D12_PROTECTED_RESOURCE_SESSION_SUPPORT_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: 值： (0x0) 指示不支持受保护的资源会话。

entities.name: D3D12_PROTECTED_SESSION_STATUS
entities.description: 枚举类型，表示受保护会话的状态。如果返回值为D3D12_PROTECTED_SESSION_STATUS_INVALID，当会话为ID3D12ProtectedResourceSession时，需要等待唯一性值变更以重用资源。
entities.remarks: 有关详细信息，请参阅查询相关文档。

entities.name: D3D12_PROTECTED_SESSION_STATUS_INVALID
entities.description: Value: 1 - Indicates the protected session is not in a valid state.

entities.name: D3D12_PROTECTED_SESSION_STATUS_OK
entities.description: Value: 0. Indicates the protected session is in a valid state.

entities.name: NumPrimitivesWritten
entities.description: UINT64类型，表示实际写入流输出资源的点、线和三角形基元的数目。

entities.name: PrimitivesStorageNeeded
entities.description: UINT64类型常量。当流输出资源足够大时，表示可写入的基元总数；否则表示实际写入的基元总数（假设空间足够）。
entities.remarks: 需与D3D12_QUERY_HEAP_TYPE枚举和CreateQueryHeap函数配合使用。

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_HEAP_TYPE_PIPELINE_STATISTICS
entities.description: 值为2，表示查询堆用于存储管道统计信息。参见D3D12_QUERY_DATA_PIPELINE_STATISTICS结构。

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_HEAP_TYPE_VIDEO_DECODE_STATISTICS
entities.description: 值为4，指示堆包含视频解码统计信息。参考D3D12_QUERY_DATA_VIDEO_DECODE_STATISTICS。只能从视频解码命令列表(D3D12_COMMAND_LIST_TYPE_VIDEO_DECODE)查询视频解码统计信息。详细信息请参阅D3D12_QUERY_TYPE_DECODE_STATISTICS。

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_HEAP_TYPE_OCCLUSION
entities.description: Specifies the occlusion query heap type (value: 0). Returns binary 0/1 result where 0 indicates no samples passed depth/stencil tests, 1 indicates at least one sample passed. Ensures occlusion queries don't interfere with GPU optimizations related to depth/stencil testing.

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_HEAP_TYPE_TIMESTAMP
entities.description: Specifies the query heap type for timestamp queries. Value: 1 indicates the heap is suitable for high-performance timing data.

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_HEAP_TYPE_SO_STATISTICS
entities.description: 值为3，指示堆包含流输出数据。请参阅D3D12_QUERY_DATA_SO_STATISTICS。

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_HEAP_TYPE_COPY_QUEUE_TIMESTAMP
entities.description: 值：5。指示堆包含由复制命令列表以独占方式发出的时间戳查询。只能从复制命令列表查询复制队列时间戳，而复制命令列表不能向常规时间戳查询堆发出。对此查询堆类型的支持不是通用的，必须使用 CheckFeatureSupport 进行验证。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 D3D12_QUERY_HEAP_DESC 结构使用。

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_TYPE_BINARY_OCCLUSION
entities.description: Specifies a binary occlusion query type in Direct3D 12.

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_TYPE_PIPELINE_STATISTICS
entities.description: Specifies pipeline statistics query type (value = 3)

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_TYPE_OCCLUSION
entities.description: 值：0，指示查询针对深度/模具遮挡计数。与D3D12_QUERY_TYPE_BINARY_OCCLUSION(值：1)的区别在于后者只返回二进制0/1结果，表示是否有样本通过深度和模具测试。

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_TYPE_TIMESTAMP
entities.description: 值为2，表示该查询类型用于高精度GPU和CPU时间戳测量。

entities.name: D3D12_QUERY_TYPE_VIDEO_DECODE_STATISTICS
entities.description: Value: 8. Specifies video decode statistics. See D3D12_QUERY_DATA_VIDEO_DECODE_STATISTICS. Use this query type to determine if video decoding succeeded. If decoding fails due to insufficient BitRate or FrameRate parameters during decode heap creation, the query's status field will indicate failure.

entities.name: D3D12_VIDEO_DECODE_STATUS_RATE_EXCEEDED
entities.description: Indicates the video decode rate exceeded the allowed limit. This status is used with ID3D12VideoDecodeCommandList::EndQuery to report when the decode operation exceeds the bitrate or framerate limits.
entities.remarks: Used with BeginQuery, EndQuery and ResolveQueryData functions to monitor video decode performance.

entities.name: DepthBiasClamp
entities.description: 像素的最大深度偏差。有关深度偏差的信息，请参阅深度偏差。

entities.name: ForcedSampleCount
entities.description: UAV呈现或光栅化时强制的样本计数。有效值为0、1、4、8和可选16。0表示样本计数不是强制的。注意：如果要在ForcedSampleCount设置为1或更大的情况下进行呈现，必须遵循以下准则：不要绑定深度模具视图，禁用深度测试，确保着色器不输出深度。如果将任何呈现器目标视图绑定(D3D12_DESCRIPTOR_HEAP_TYPE_RTV)，必须满足特定条件。

entities.name: MultisampleEnable
entities.description: 与 AntialiasedLineEnable 成员的设置仅适用于多重采样抗锯齿 (MSAA) 呈现目标（即呈现样本计数大于 1）。由于功能级别行为存在差异，建议在 MSAA 呈现目标上呈现时始终启用此设置，除非不执行线条绘制或不介意线条呈现为四边形。

entities.name: D3D12_RAY_FLAG_FORCE_OPAQUE
entities.description: 值为 0x1，表示在光线跟踪中遇到的所有光线基元交集都被视为不透明，无论命中几何图形是否指定不透明度。

entities.name: D3D12_RAY_FLAG_FORCE_NON_OPAQUE
entities.description: 值为 0x2，表示在光线跟踪中遇到的所有光线基元交集都被视为非不透明，无论命中几何图形是否指定不透明属性。

entities.name: D3D12_RAY_FLAG_ACCEPT_FIRST_HIT_AND_END_SEARCH
entities.description: 值：0x4。光线跟踪中遇到的第一个光线基元交集会自动导致在任何命中着色器之后立即调用AcceptHitAndEndSearch，包括没有任何命中着色器的情况。唯一的例外是前面的任何命中着色器调用IgnoreHit时，在这种情况下光线继续不受影响，使下一次命中成为第一次命中的另一个候选项。若要应用此异常，必须实际执行任何命中着色器。因此，如果跳过任何命中着色器（例如由于RAY_FLAG_FORCE_OPAQUE），则此标志不适用。

entities.name: D3D12_RAY_FLAG_CULL_BACK_FACING_TRIANGLES
entities.description: 值：0x10。启用对朝后三角形的剔除。在指定D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAG_TRIANGLE_CULL_DISABLE的实例上，此标志不起作用。在除D3D12_RAYTRACING_GEOMETRY_TYPE_TRIANGLES以外的几何图形类型上，此标志不起作用。此标志与RAY_FLAG_CULL_FRONT_FACING_TRIANGLES互斥。

entities.name: D3D12_RAY_FLAG_CULL_NON_OPAQUE
entities.description: 值为0x80，表示根据几何图形和实例标志剔除所有被视为非不透明的基元。此标志与RAY_FLAG_FORCE_OPAQUE、RAY_FLAG_FORCE_NON_OPAQUE和RAY_FLAG_CULL_OPAQUE互斥。

entities.name: D3D12_RAY_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: 值为0，表示未选择任何光线追踪选项标志。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_GEOMETRY_FLAG_OPAQUE
entities.description: 值为 0x1，表示当光线遇到此几何图形时，几何图形的作用就好像没有任何命中着色器存在。建议应用自由使用此标志，因为它可以启用重要的光线处理优化。注意：可以使用 TraceRay 中的光线标志按实例(D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAGS)或基于每条光线重写此行为。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAG_OPAQUE
entities.description: Specifies that the instance is opaque (does not allow any-hit shader invocation). When this flag is set, the system will call AcceptHitAndEndSearch on first hit.

entities.name: D3D12_RAY_FLAG_SKIP_CLOSEST_HIT_SHADER
entities.description: 值为0x8，指示即使已提交至少一个命中且最近命中的命中组包含最近的命中着色器，也应跳过该着色器的执行。

entities.name: D3D12_RAY_FLAG_CULL_FRONT_FACING_TRIANGLES
entities.description: 值：0x20。启用对正面三角形的剔除。请参阅D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAGS了解如何选择哪些三角形面向每个实例。在指定D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAG_TRIANGLE_CULL_DISABLE的实例上，此标志不起作用。在除D3D12_RAYTRACING_GEOMETRY_TYPE_TRIANGLES以外的几何图形类型上，此标志不起作用。此标志与RAY_FLAG_CULL_FRONT_FACING_TRIANGLES互斥。

entities.name: D3D12_RAY_FLAG_CULL_OPAQUE
entities.description: 值： 0x40 根据几何图形和实例标志剔除所有被视为不透明的基元。 此标志与 RAY_FLAG_FORCE_OPAQUE、RAY_FLAG_FORCE_NON_OPAQUE 和 RAY_FLAG_CULL_NON_OPAQUE 互斥。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_AABB
entities.description: 表示用于光线追踪几何图形的轴对齐边界框(AABB)。

members.name: MinX
members.description: 框的最小 X 坐标。 MinY 框的最小 Y 坐标。 MinZ 框的最小 Z 坐标。 MaxX 框的最大 X 坐标。 MaxY 框的最大 Y 坐标。 MaxZ 框的最大 Z 坐标。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_FLAG_ALLOW_UPDATE
entities.description: Specifies that the acceleration structure can be updated after initial build.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_FLAG_ALLOW_COMPACTION
entities.description: Specifies that the acceleration structure can be compacted after build. Using ALLOW_COMPACTION may increase the pre-compaction acceleration structure size compared to not specifying it. If multiple incremental builds are performed before final compaction, redundant compaction-related work may be done. The size required for the compacted acceleration structure can be queried before compaction.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_FLAG_PREFER_FAST_TRACE
entities.description: 值为0x4，表示构建高质量的加速结构，以牺牲额外的生成时间为代价，最大程度地提高光线跟踪性能。通常实现的生成时间是默认设置的2-3倍，以获得更好的跟踪性能。特别建议将此标志用于静态几何图形。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_FLAG_PREFER_FAST_BUILD
entities.description: 值：0x8。构造一个质量较低的加速结构，以光线跟踪性能来提升生成速度。通常实现比默认设置花费1/2到1/3的生成时间，同时会牺牲跟踪性能。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_FLAG_MINIMIZE_MEMORY
entities.description: Specifies the acceleration structure build flag to minimize memory usage.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: 值为0，表示未为加速结构生成指定任何特殊选项。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_FLAG_PERFORM_UPDATE
entities.description: 值：0x20。执行加速结构更新，而不是从头开始生成。这比完整生成更快，但可能会对光线跟踪性能产生负面影响，特别是在更新前基础对象位置与原始生成相比发生重大变化时。如果源和目标加速结构地址相同，则就地执行更新。源和目标地址范围的任何其他重叠都无效。对于不重叠的源和目标，源加速结构不会被修改。输出加速结构的内存要求与输入源加速结构相同。源加速结构必须已使用D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_FLAG_ALLOW_UPDATE标志构建。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_COPY_MODE_COMPACT
entities.description: Generates a functionally equivalent acceleration structure in the target similar to clone mode, but also fits the target into potentially smaller (but never larger) memory footprint. The required size for the target can be retrieved beforehand from EmitRaytracingAccelerationStructurePostbuildInfo. Only applicable when the source acceleration structure was initially built with D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_FLAG_ALLOW_COMPACTION.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_FLAG_ALLOW_UPDA
entities.description: Specifies that the acceleration structure should allow updates. When set, certain information needs to be preserved in the acceleration structure. Compression may still be beneficial, but the structure can be made more compact if the pipeline knows the acceleration structure won't be updated again.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_COPY_MODE_VISUALIZATION_DECODE_FOR_T
entities.description: OOLS = 0x2,

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_COPY_MODE_CLONE
entities.description: Value: 0. Copies the acceleration structure while fixing any potential self-referencing pointers, making the target a self-contained copy of the source. Any external pointers to other acceleration structures remain unchanged from source to target in the copy. The target size is the same as the source size.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_COPY_MODE_VISUALIZATION_DECODE_FOR_TOOLS
entities.description: Value: 0x2. Target format for visualization decode.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_COPY_MODE_DESERIALIZE
entities.description: Value: 0x4. Source must be a serialized acceleration structure, with any pointers (immediately following the header) fixed to point to their new locations.

entities.name: D_SIZE_DESC
entities.description: 描述压缩后加速结构的空间要求。

entities.name: CompactedSizeInBytes
entities.description: 指定压缩后加速结构的空间要求。保证压缩加速结构不会比非压缩加速结构占用更多空间。在压缩前，GetRaytracingAccelerationStructurePrebuildInfo报告的大小要求足以存储任何加速结构，即使生成输入减少(如三角形计数减少)。但对于压缩后的结构，此非递增属性不适用，即不能保证较少项的加速结构压缩后会比较多项的结构更小。

entities.name: SIZE_DESC
entities.description: 描述加速结构当前使用的空间。。
entities.syntax: typedef struct SIZE_DESC

entities.name: CurrentSizeInBytes
entities.description: 加速结构当前使用的空间大小（以字节为单位）。如果加速结构尚未对它执行压缩操作，则此大小与初始分配大小相同。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_POSTBUILD_INFO_COMPACTED_SIZE
entities.description: 值为0，表示生成后信息是压缩后加速结构的空间要求。
entities.remarks: 此信息对于确定加速结构占用的内存量非常有用。

entities.name: ION_DESC
entities.description: 描述序列化加速结构和标头的大小和布局
entities.syntax: typedef struct ION_DESC

entities.name: SerializedSizeInBytes
entities.description: 序列化加速结构（包括标头）的大小，以字节为单位

entities.name: NumBottomLevelAccelerationStructurePointers
entities.description: 指定在D3D12_SERIALIZED_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_HEADER之后，序列化加速结构开始时的64位GPU虚拟地址数量。对于底部加速结构，此值为0；对于顶级加速结构，则指示所引用的加速结构指针数量。在反序列化时，这些指针必须由应用程序初始化到新的底层加速结构位置。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_POSTBUILD_INFO_TOOLS_VISUALIZATION_D
entities.description: Specifies the decoded size in bytes for tools visualization of ray tracing acceleration structure post-build info

entities.name: DecodedSizeInBytes
entities.description: 指定将加速结构解码为可视化工具可识别格式所需的缓冲区大小（字节数）。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_POSTBUILD_INFO_SERIALIZATION
entities.description: Value: 0x2. Specifies post-build information is the space requirement for serializing acceleration structure. For more information, see D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_POSTBUILD_INFO_DESC.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_POSTBUILD_INFO_CURRENT_SIZE
entities.description: Value: 0x3. Post-build information indicating the current size of the acceleration structure. For more details, see D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_POSTBUILD_INFO_DESC.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_POSTBUILD_INFO_TOOLS_VISUALIZATION
entities.description: Value: 0x1. Specifies the post-build information for the space requirements of acceleration structure tool visualization.

entities.name: ResultDataMaxSizeInBytes
entities.description: Specifies the maximum size in bytes required to store the acceleration structure generation results based on given inputs.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_TYPE_BOTTOM_LEVEL
entities.description: 值为0x1，表示底层加速结构类型
entities.remarks: 每个底层加速结构都包含一组几何图形，这些几何图形是场景的构建基块。 顶级加速结 构表示底层加速结构的一组实例。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_TYPE_TOP_LEVEL
entities.description: 值： 0 顶级加速结构。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_GEOMETRY_FLAG_NO_DUPLICATE_ANYHIT_INVOCATION
entities.description: Value: 0x2. By default, the system may trigger the any-hit shader multiple times for a given ray-primitive intersection. In some cases, this flexibility helps improve traversal efficiency of acceleration structures. For example, if the acceleration structure is implemented internally using bounding volumes, the implementation might find it advantageous to store relatively long triangles in multiple bounding boxes rather than storing a single large box. However, some application use cases require intersections to be reported to the any-hit shader at most once. This flag provides that guarantee for the given geometry, which may come with some performance impact. This flag applies to all geometry types.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_GEOMETRY_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: 值： 0 没有指定选项。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_TRANSFORM3X4_BYTE_ALIGNMENT
entities.description: Alignment requirement for 3x4 transform matrices in D3D12 raytracing

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_INDEX_BUFFER
entities.description: 值为0x2。当3D管道作为索引缓冲区访问子资源时，子资源必须处于此状态。这是只读状态。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_NON_PIXEL_SHADER_RESOURCE
entities.description: Specifies the resource state for non-pixel shader resource access.

parameters.name: IndexCountPerInstance
parameters.description: 类型： UINT 从每个实例的索引缓冲区读取的索引数。

parameters.name: InstanceCount
parameters.description: 类型： UINT 要绘制的实例数。

parameters.name: StartIndexLocation
parameters.description: 类型： UINT GPU 从索引缓冲区读取的第一个索引的位置。

parameters.name: BaseVertexLocation
parameters.description: 类型： INT 从顶点缓冲区读取顶点之前添加到每个索引的值。

parameters.name: StartInstanceLocation
parameters.description: 类型： UINT 从顶点缓冲区读取每个实例数据之前添加到每个索引的值。

entities.remarks: Used to indicate that a resource is accessible by non-pixel shaders.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_GEOMETRY_TYPE_PROCEDURAL_PRIMITIVE_AABBS
entities.description: Specifies procedural primitive geometry type using axis-aligned bounding boxes (AABBs) for ray tracing acceleration structures.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_GEOMETRY_TYPE_TRIANGLES
entities.description: Specifies the geometry type is triangles for Direct3D 12 ray tracing. Value: 0

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_DESC
entities.description: 描述在加速结构生成过程中 GPU 内存中使用的光线跟踪加速结构的实例。

entities.name: InstanceContributionToHitGroupIndex
entities.description: A 24-bit value representing per-instance contribution added to shader table index for selecting hit group to use. Flags is an 8-bit mask representing D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAGS applied to the instance.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAG_TRIANGLE_CULL_DISABLE
entities.description: 值：0x1。禁用此实例的正面/背面剔除。Ray标志RAY_FLAG_CULL_BACK_FACING_TRIANGLES和RAY_FLAG_CULL_FRONT_FACING_TRIANGLES对此实例无效。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAG_TRIANGLE_FRONT_COUNTERCLOCKWISE
entities.description: Specifies that triangle front face is counter-clockwise

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAG_FORCE_NON_OPAQUE
entities.description: 值为0x8，表示实例将强制被视为非不透明，即使底层加速结构中的几何图形被标记为不透明

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: 值为0，表示不指定任何光线追踪实例选项。

entities.name: RAY_FLAG_CULL_FRONT_FACING_TRIANGLES
entities.description: Flag value: 0x2. This flag reverses front and back faces, useful when the application's natural winding order differs from the default. By default, a triangle is front-facing if its vertices appear counter-clockwise from the ray origin in object space (left-handed coordinate system). These winding rules are defined in object space and are not affected by instance transformations.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_INSTANCE_FLAG_FORCE_OPAQUE
entities.description: 值为0x4的常量，指定实例引用的底层加速结构中的所有几何图形将被强制视为不透明(opaque)

entities.name: MaxTraceRecursionDepth
entities.description: 类型：UINT。光线跟踪管道的光线递归限制。必须在0到31的范围内。在最大递归深度以下，着色器调用(如最近的命中或未命中着色器)可以调用TraceRay任意次数。在最大递归深度下，TraceRay调用会导致设备进入已删除状态。
entities.remarks: 光线跟踪管道需要一个光线跟踪管道配置。如果存在多个管道配置，则它们必须在内容中全部匹配。但这种重复没有好处。例如，为每个集合定义一次它无助于驱动程序在创建光线跟踪管道之前进行早期着色器编译。这与D3D12_RAYTRACING_SHADER_CONFIG不同，后者确实受益于每个集合的重复。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_PIPELINE_FLAG_SKIP_TRIANGLES
entities.description: Value: 0x100. Specifies that for any TraceRay call in this ray tracing pipeline, the RAY_FLAG_SKIP_TRIANGLES ray flag should be added. The combined ray flags must be valid. The presence of this flag in the ray tracing pipeline configuration won't appear in RayFlags calls from shaders. Implementations may optimize the pipeline knowing specific primitive types don't need to be considered.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_PIPELINE_FLAG_SKIP_PROCEDURAL_PRIMITIVES
entities.description: Value: 0x200. Specifies that for any TraceRay call in this ray tracing pipeline, the RAY_FLAG_SKIP_PROCEDURAL_PRIMITIVES ray flag should be added.

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_PIPELINE_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: Value: 0. Specifies no options.

entities.name: MaxPayloadSizeInBytes
entities.description: Specifies the maximum size (in bytes) of the ray payload in a ray tracing pipeline, where each count represents 4 bytes.

entities.name: MaxAttributeSizeInBytes
entities.description: 每个属性的最大尺寸（计为4个字节），可用于包含此着色器的管道中的属性。该值不能超过D3D12_RAYTRACING_MAX_ATTRIBUTE_SIZE_IN_BYTES。
entities.remarks: 光线跟踪管道需要一个光线跟踪着色器配置。如果存在多个着色器配置（例如每个集合中有一个用于为每个着色器配置启用独立驱动程序编译），则合并到光线跟踪管道时，它们必须全部匹配。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_TIER
entities.description: 指定图形设备上的光线跟踪支持级别。
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_RAYTRACING_TIER {

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_TIER_NOT_SUPPORTED
entities.description: 值为0，表示设备不支持光线追踪。尝试创建光线追踪相关对象将失败，使用光线追踪API会导致未定义行为。

entities.name: D3D12_RAYTRACING_TIER_1_0
entities.description: 值为10，表示设备支持D3D12光线追踪功能的第1层。在当前版本中，此层包含所有可用的光线追踪功能。
entities.remarks: 若要确定图形设备支持的光线跟踪层，请传递 D3D12_FEATURE_DATA_D3D12_OPTIONS5 结构。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACC
entities.description: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS_CLEAR_PARAMETERS结构(d3d12.h)，描述在呈现通道开始时应清除资源的明文值。
entities.syntax:
typedef struct D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS_CLEAR_PARAMETERS {   D3D12_CLEAR_VALUE ClearValue;
} D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS_CLEAR_PARAMETERS;

members.name: ClearValue
members.description: D3D12_CLEAR_VALUE。 应清除资源 () 的明文值。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS_TYPE_CLEAR
entities.description: Specifies that the resource should be cleared with explicit values.

entities.name: ESS_TYPE
entities.description: 指定应用程序在转换到呈现通道时 () 指定资源的访问权限类型。
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS_TYPE {   D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS_TYPE_DISCARD = 0,

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS_TYPE_PRESERVE
entities.description: 指示应用程序依赖于资源的先前内容，因此必须从内存加载内容。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS_TYPE_NO_ACCESS
entities.description: 指示应用程序在呈现传递期间不会读取或写入资源。通常用于指示不会访问深度/模具视图的深度/模具平面(DSV)。必须将此值与相应D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS结构中的D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS_TYPE_NO_ACCESS配对使用。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS_TYPE_PRESERVE_LOCAL_SRV
entities.description: Specifies the render pass beginning access type for preserving local SRV (Shader Resource View)

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS_TYPE_DISCARD
entities.description: 值：0。指示应用程序不依赖于资源的先前内容。显示驱动程序可能返回以前写入的内容或未初始化的数据。从资源读取不会挂起GPU，但可能返回未定义数据。读取包括：UAV(无序访问视图)、SRV(着色器资源视图)、CBV(常量缓冲区视图)、VBV(顶点缓冲区视图)、IBV(索引缓冲区视图)、IndirectArg绑定/读取或混合/深度测试引入的读取。

entities.name: BeginRenderPass
entities.description: 时间，位于 D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS 结构的 Clear 成员中。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_DEPTH_STENCIL
entities.description: 描述在呈现传递到深度模具视图(DSV)期间固定的绑定及其开始和结束访问特征。
entities.syntax:
typedef struct D3D12_RENDER_PASS_DEPTH_STENCIL_DESC {
    D3D12_CPU_DESCRIPTOR_HANDLE cpuDescriptor;

entities.name: StencilEndingAccess
entities.description: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS。访问在转换出呈现通道时请求的模具缓冲区。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS_RESOLVE_PARAMETERS
entities.description: Specifies parameters for resolve operations when ending a render pass.

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS_PRESERVE_LOCAL_PARAMETERS
entities.description: PreserveLocal; }; } D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS;

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS_TYPE_RESOLVE
entities.description: Specifies the resource description when resolving.

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS_TYPE_PRESERVE
entities.description: 指示应用程序将来将依赖于资源的写入内容，因此必须保留这些内容。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS_TYPE_DISCARD
entities.description: 值为0，指示应用程序将来不会依赖于在此呈现传递期间写入资源的任何数据。例如，深度缓冲区在再次写入之前不会对其进行纹理化。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS_TYPE_NO_ACCESS
entities.description: 指示应用程序在渲染传递期间不会读取或写入资源。常用于指示不会访问深度/模板视图(DSV)的深度/模板平面。必须与D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS结构中的对应值一起使用。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_FLAGS
entities.description: 指定渲染通道的性质/要求；例如，它是挂起还是正在恢复的渲染阶段，或者是否要写入无序的访问视图(UAV)。
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_RENDER_PASS_FLAGS {   D3D12_RENDER_PASS_FLAG_NONE = 0,

return_value.description: 无

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_FLAG_ALLOW_UAV_WRITES
entities.description: Specifies that UAV writes are allowed during the render pass.

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_FLAG_RESUMING_PASS
entities.description: Flag indicating the render pass is resuming a previous pass

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: 值为0，表示渲染通道没有特殊要求或标志。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_FLAG_SUSPENDING_PASS
entities.description: Specifies that this is a suspending render pass. Value: 0x2

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_RENDER_TARGET
entities.description: 描述在呈现传递期间一个或多个呈现器目标视图(RTV)及其开始和结束访问特征。
entities.syntax: typedef struct D3D12_RENDER_PASS_RENDER_TARGET_DESC {   D3D12_CPU_DESCRIPTOR_HANDLE        cpuDescriptor;   D3D12_RENDER_PASS_BEGINNING_ACCESS BeginningAccess;

entities.name: EndingAccess
entities.description: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_ENDING_ACCESS。对RTV的访问在转换出呈现通道时请求的操作。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_TIER_0
entities.description: Represents tier 0 of render pass functionality

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_TIER_1
entities.description: 值为1，表示渲染通道功能由用户模式显示驱动程序实现，可能加速渲染目标/深度缓冲区写入。不支持无序访问视图(UAV)写入的高效实现。

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_PASS_TIER_2
entities.description: 值为2，表示呈现通道功能由用户模式显示驱动程序实现。在此层级下，渲染目标/深度缓冲区写入可能会加速，且无序访问视图(UAV)写入在后续呈现通道前不读取时，可能比不使用呈现通道更高效。
entities.remarks: 若要确定图形设备的呈现通道支持级别，请检查D3D12_FEATURE_DATA_D3D12_OPTIONS5结构。

entities.name: LogicOpEnable
entities.description: 与 BlendEnable 都无效，两者均为 TRUE。LogicOpEnable 指定是启用还是禁用逻辑操作。设置为 TRUE 可启用逻辑操作。

entities.name: SrcBlend
entities.description: D3D12_BLEND 枚举常量，指定源颜色混合因子，用于确定像素着色器输出的 RGB 值如何与渲染目标中的现有颜色混合

entities.name: D3D12_RENDER_TARGET_VIEW_DESC
entities.description: 描述使用渲染目标视图访问的资源中的子资源。
entities.syntax: typedef struct D3D12_RENDER_TARGET_VIEW_DESC {   DXGI_FORMAT         Format;

entities.name: D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION
entities.description: Specifies the type of resource to be viewed as a render target.
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION {   D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION_UNKNOWN = 0,   D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION_BUFFER = 1,

entities.name: D3D12_TEX1D_RTV
entities.description: Describes a 1D texture resource that can be used as a render target view.

entities.name: D3D12_TEX1D_ARRAY_RTV
entities.description: Specifies the subresources from an array of 1D textures to use in a render-target view.
entities.remarks: 将此结构与 D3D12_RENDER_TARGET_VIEW_DESC 结构一起使用，将资源视为一维纹理数组。

members.name: MipSlice
members.description: 要使用 mip 切片的 mipmap 级别的索引。 FirstArraySlice 在纹理数组中使用的第一个纹理的索引。 ArraySize 要使用的纹理数。

entities.name: D3D12_TEX2D_ARRAY_RTV
entities.description: Describes the subresources from a 2D texture array that are accessible using a render-target view.
entities.remarks: 将此结构与 D3D12_RENDER_TARGET_VIEW_DESC 结构一起使用，将资源视为 2D 纹理数组。 要求要求 Header

members.name: MipSlice
members.description: 要使用 mip 切片的 mipmap 级别的索引。 FirstArraySlice 在纹理数组中使用的第一个纹理的索引。 ArraySize 从 FirstArraySlice 开始，数组中在呈现目标视图中使用的纹理数。 PlaneSlice 索引 (平面切片编号) 纹理数组中使用的平面。

entities.name: D3D12_TEX2DMS_ARRAY_RTV
entities.description: 描述要用于呈现目标视图的多采样2D纹理数组中的子资源。
entities.remarks: 将 render-target-view 说明传递到 ID3D12Device：：CreateRenderTargetView 以创建呈现目标视图。 呈现器目标视图不能使用以下格式： 任何无类型格式。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R32G32B32
entities.description: A DXGI format constant representing a 96-bit format using 32 bits per channel (red, green, blue).

entities.name: D3D12_RESIDENCY_FLAGS
entities.description: Specifies flags for controlling residency behavior of objects when the application exceeds its memory budget.
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_RESIDENCY_FLAGS {   D3D12_RESIDENCY_FLAG_NONE = 0,

parameters.name: Flags
parameters.description: 控制如果应用程序超出其内存预算，是否应使对象驻留。

entities.name: D3D12_RESIDENCY_FLAG_DENY_OVERBUDGET
entities.description: Specifies that EnqueueMakeResident function should return E_OUTOFMEMORY when residency operation exceeds the application's current memory budget. Value: 0x1

entities.name: D3D12_RESIDENCY_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: 值：0。指定默认驻留策略，无论应用程序的当前内存预算如何，该策略都允许驻留操作成功。EnqueueMakeResident仅在没有可用内存时返回E_OUTOFMEMORY。

entities.name: D3D12_RESIDENCY_PRIORITY
entities.description: 指定可用于快速建立应用程序优先级方案的广泛驻留优先级存储桶。应用程序可以分配此枚举中存在的五个值以外的优先级值。
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_RESIDENCY_PRIORITY {

entities.name: D3D12_RESIDENCY_PRIORITY_MINIMUM
entities.description: Minimum residency priority value (0x28000000)

entities.name: D3D12_RESIDENCY_PRIORITY_NORMAL
entities.description: 值：0x78000000，指示正常优先级、中等优先级。有关详细信息，请参阅ID3D12Device1::SetResidencyPriority。

entities.name: D3D12_RESIDENCY_PRIORITY_LOW
entities.description: 值为0x50000000，指示资源驻留优先级为低

entities.name: D3D12_RESIDENCY_PRIORITY_MAXIMUM
entities.description: Value: 0xC8000000. Indicates maximum residency priority. Applications should not use priorities higher than this value as they are not guaranteed.

entities.name: SetResidencyPriority
entities.description: 备注 此枚举由 SetResidencyPriority 方法使用。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOLVE_MODE_DECOMPRESS
entities.description: 值为0，表示将压缩的源样本解析为其未压缩的值。使用此操作时，源和目标资源必须具有相同的样本计数（与要求目标样本计数为1的最小值、最大值和平均运算不同）。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOLVE_MODE_MIN
entities.description: 值为1，表示将源样本解析为最小值。可与任何渲染目标或深度模具格式一起使用。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOLVE_MODE_AVERAGE
entities.description: 值为3，表示将源样本解析为其平均值。可以与任何非整数呈现目标格式（包括深度平面）一起使用，但不能与整数呈现目标格式（包括模具平面）一起使用。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 ID3D12GraphicsCommandList1：：ResolveSubresourceRegion 函数使用。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOLVE_MODE_ENCODE_SAMPLER_FEEDBACK
entities.description: Specifies the sampler feedback resolve mode for encoding.

entities.name: D3D12_RESOLVE_MODE_MAX
entities.description: 值为2，表示将源样本解析为最大值。可以与任何渲染目标或深度模具格式一起使用。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_ALIASING_BARRIER
entities.description: Specifies a resource aliasing barrier. During activation, pResourceBefore can be NULL. All resources sharing physical memory with the activated resource become inactive, including overlapping placed and reserved resources. Aliasing barriers should be grouped together and submitted for maximum efficiency. After activation, resources with render target or depth-stencil flags must be further initialized.
entities.syntax:
typedef struct D3D12_RESOURCE_ALIASING_BARRIER {
ID3D12Resource *pResourceBefore;   ID3D12Resource *pResourceAfter;} D3D12_RESOURCE_ALIASING_BARRIER;
entities.remarks: 此结构是 D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER 结构的成员。 可以指定之前和之后的资源，或者一个或两个资源可以为 NULL，这表示任何放置或保留的资源都可能导致别名。 请参阅 CreatePlacedResource 中所述的使用模型。

members.name: pResourceBefore
members.description: 指向 ID3D12Resource 对象的指针，该对象表示转换中使用的前资源。 pResourceAfter 指向 ID3D12Resource 对象的指针，该对象表示转换中使用的后资源。

entities.name: SizeInBytes
entities.description: Unsigned 64-bit integer type representing resource size in bytes.
entities.remarks: Used by ID3D12Device::GetResourceAllocationInfo1 method.

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_UAV_BARRIER
entities.description: 描述一个资源屏障，确保所有无序访问视图(UAV)的读写操作在后续UAV访问开始前完成。资源可以为NULL，表示任何UAV访问都可能需要屏障。
entities.syntax: typedef struct D3D12_RESOURCE_UAV_BARRIER { ID3D12Resource *pResource; } D3D12_RESOURCE_UAV_BARRIER;
entities.remarks: 此结构表示一个资源，在该资源中，所有无序访问视图 (UAV) 访问 (读取或写入) 之前，(读取或写入) 开始。 此结构是 D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER 结构的成员。 无需在仅读取 UAV 的 2 个绘制或调度调用之间插入 UAV 屏障。 此外，如果你知道以任何顺序安全地执行 UAV 访问，则无需在写入同一 UAV 的 2 个绘制或调度调用之间插入 UAV 屏障。 资源可以为 NULL，这表示任何 UAV 访问都可能需要屏障。

members.name: Type
members.description: 一个D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_TYPE类型的值，用于指定资源屏障的类型。 此成员确 定在以下联合中使用的类型。 Flags 指定 D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_FLAGS 枚举常量，例如“仅开始”或“仅结束”。 Transition 描述子资源在不同用法之间的转换的 D3D12_RESOURCE_TRANSITION_BARRIER 结构。 成员指定子资源的使用前后。 Aliasing 一个D3D12_RESOURCE_ALIASING_BARRIER结构，用于描述两个映射到同一堆的不同资 源的使用情况之间的转换。 UAV 一种D3D12_RESOURCE_UAV_BARRIER结构，描述一个资源，在该资源中，所有 UAV 访 问 (读取或写入) 必须先完成，然后才能开始 (读取或写入) 的任何未来 UAV 访问。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_FLAG_BEGIN_ONLY
entities.description: 值为0x1，表示在新状态下启动屏障转换，使资源处于暂时的无访问状态

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_FLAG_END_ONLY
entities.description: 值为0x2，表示此屏障完成转换、设置新状态并还原对资源的活动访问。
entities.remarks: 拆分屏障允许将单个转换拆分为开始和结束部分（参考多引擎同步）。此枚举由D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER结构的Flags成员使用。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: Specifies no resource barrier flags. Value: 0

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_TYPE_TRANSITION
entities.description: 值为0，表示一个转换屏障，用于在不同用法之间转换一组子资源。调用方必须在使用子资源之前和之后指定该屏障。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_TYPE_UAV
entities.description: 无序访问视图 (UAV) 屏障，该屏障指示对特定资源的读取或写入的所有 UAV 访问必须完成，之后才能开始任何新的 UAV 访问。
entities.remarks: 此常量在 D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_TYPE 枚举中使用。与 ID3D12GraphicsCommandList::ResourceBarrier 方法一起使用。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_TYPE_ALIASING
entities.description: 一个别名屏障，指示在映射到同一磁贴池的两个不同资源的使用情况之间进行转换。调用方可以同时指定之前和之后的资源。注意：一个或两个资源都可以为NULL，这表示任何平铺资源都可能导致别名。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_BINDING_TIER_1
entities.description: Resource binding tier 1 constant value

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_BINDING_TIER_2
entities.description: Direct3D 12资源绑定层级的第2层，表示硬件支持的资源绑定能力级别

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_BINDING_TIER_3
entities.description: Value: 3. Tier 3 resource binding capability level. See Hardware Tiers.
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 D3D12_FEATURE_DATA_D3D12_OPTIONS 结构使用。

entities.name: DepthOrArraySize
entities.description: Specifies the depth (for 3D textures) or array size (for 1D/2D texture arrays). Used in D3D12 resource descriptions.
entities.remarks: Used in: ID3D12Resource::GetDesc, ID3D12Device resource creation methods (CreateCommittedResource, CreatePlacedResource, CreateReservedResource), "ID3D12Device"::GetCopyableFootprints, and various helper functions.

entities.name: D3D11_REQ_TEXTURE1D_U_DIMENSION
entities.description: D3D11_REQ_TEXTURE1D_U_DIMENSION。宽度限制值，高度必须为1。

entities.name: D3D11_REQ_TEXTURE1D_ARRAY_AXIS_DIMENSION
entities.description: Direct3D 11 功能级别 11_0 或更高版本对 TEXTURE1D 数组轴维度的限制值

entities.name: D3D11_REQ_TEXTURE2D_U_OR_V_DIMENSION
entities.description: Direct3D 11功能级别11_0或更高版本支持的纹理2D U或V维度最大值。

entities.name: D3D11_REQ_TEXTURE2D_ARRAY_AXIS_DIMENSION
entities.description: Maximum allowed dimension for Texture2D array axis. For TEXTURE3D: width, height and DepthOrArraySize must be less than or equal to D3D10_REQ_TEXTURE3D_U_V_OR_W_DIMENSION on feature levels up to 11_0, and D3D11_REQ_TEXTURE2D_U_V_OR_W_DIMENSION on feature level 11_0 or higher. DepthOrArraySize is interpreted as depth.

entities.name: MipLevels
entities.description: 纹理视图的最大mipmap级别数。设置为-1表示从MostDetailedMip到最不详细的所有mipmap级别。此常量是D3D12_SHADER_RESOURCE_VIEW_DESC结构的一个成员。
entities.remarks: 此常量是着色器资源视图描述的一部分。例如，若MostDetailedMip=6且MipLevels=2，视图将有权访问纹理的mipmap级别6和7。MostDetailedMip应不大于原始资源中的MipLevel。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_CROSS_ADAPTER
entities.description: Value: 0x10. Allows the resource to be used for cross-adapter data sharing, along with capabilities enabled by D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_SIMULTANEOUS_ACCESS. Cross-adapter resources typically exclude techniques that reduce effective texture bandwidth during use, and some adapter architectures may require different caching behavior. Applications should avoid setting this flag when resource data will never be used by other adapters.

entities.name: D3D12_TEXTURE_LAYOUT_64KB_STANDARD_SWIZZLE
entities.description: 值为3，指示默认纹理使用标准化重排模式。此纹理布局的排列方式与D3D12_TEXTURE_LAYOUT_64KB_UNDEFINED_SWIZZLE相同，但磁贴中的纹素布局已定义。尾mip打包特定于适配器。在多个适配器间或CPU与GPU间封送数据时，此布局可实现优化。当多个组件理解纹理内存布局时，可以减少复制量。由于相邻纹素的旋转固定位置，此布局通常比行主布局更高效。通常只能与支持标准重排的适配器一起使用，但跨适配器共享堆存在例外。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_SIMULTANEOUS_ACCESS
entities.description: Value: 0x20. Allows simultaneous access to the resource by multiple different queues, devices, or processes (enables the resource to be used with ResourceBarrier transitions executed across multiple command lists simultaneously). Simultaneous access allows multiple readers and one writer, provided the writer does not simultaneously modify texels being accessed by other readers. Certain adapter architectures may not be able to use techniques that reduce effective texture bandwidth during use. Applications should avoid setting this flag when multiple readers are not needed during frequent, non-overlapping writes to textures. Using this flag may break resource fences that perform waits and prevent any compression from being used with the resource.

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_DESC1
entities.description: Describes a resource such as a texture, including mip regions. This structure is used in multiple methods.
entities.remarks: This structure is used to describe resource properties in Direct3D 12. It includes dimensions, format, and mip level information.

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_DIMENSION_UNKNOWN
entities.description: 值为0，表示资源的类型未知。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_DIMENSION_TEXTURE2D
entities.description: 资源是2D纹理。对应的枚举值为3。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_DIMENSION_TEXTURE3D
entities.description: 值为4，表示资源是3D纹理。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 D3D12_RESOURCE_DESC 结构使用。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: 值为0，表示未指定任何资源选项标志。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_UNORDERED_ACCESS
entities.description: 值为0x4，允许为资源创建无序访问视图(UAV)，并使资源能够进行无序访问操作

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_DENY_SHADER_RESOURCE
entities.description: 值：0x8 禁止为资源创建着色器资源视图，并禁止资源转换

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_VIDEO_DECODE_REFERENCE_ONLY
entities.description: Specifies this resource can only be used as a decode reference frame. It can be written to by video decode operations and read by video decode operations. Value: 0x40

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_VIDEO_ENCODE_REFERENCE_ONLY
entities.description: 值： 0x80 指定此资源只能用作编码参考帧。 它可以写入视频编码操作，也可以由视频编码操作读取。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE
entities.description: 值为0x100。保留供将来使用，请不要使用。需要DirectX 12 Agility SDK 1.7或更高版本。指示缓冲区将用作光线跟踪加速结构。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由D3D12_RESOURCE_DESC的 Flags 成员使用。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_PIXEL_SHADER_RESOURCE
entities.description: 标识资源可作为像素着色器的输入资源。当排除着色器资源视图时，某些适配器体系结构会增大深度模具纹理的带宽。如果纹理很少用于着色器资源，可能需要创建两个纹理副本：一个带有此标志，另一个不带有此标志。当深度模具纹理永远不会从着色器资源视图中使用时，应用程序应设置此标志。

entities.name: D3D12_VIDEO_DECODE_TIER_1
entities.description: D3D12_VIDEO_DECODE_TIER_1 and D3D12_VIDEO_DECODE_TIER_2 may be reported in D3D12_FEATURE_DATA_VIDEO_DECODE_SUPPORT structure configuration flags

entities.name: D3D12_VIDEO_DECODE_CONFIGURATION_FLAG_REFERENCE_ONLY_ALLOCATIONS_REQUIRED
entities.description: Specifies that reference frames must be allocated with D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_VIDEO_DECODE_REFERENCE_ONLY flag.

entities.name: D3D12_VIDEO_DECODE_TIER_3
entities.description: Direct3D 12视频解码层级3的标志，表示不得设置D3D12_VIDEO_DECODE_CONFIGURATION_FLAG_REFERENCE_ONLY_ALLOCATIONS_REQUIRED配置标志，且不要求使用特定资源标志。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_HEAP_TIER_1
entities.description: 值：1 指示堆只能支持单个资源类别中的资源。有关资源类别的列表，请参阅备注。 在第 1 层中，这些资源类别互斥，不能与同一堆一起使用。 创建堆时必须使用正确的 D3D12_HEAP_FLAGS 枚举常量声明资源类别。应用程序不能创建包含允许所有三个类别的标志的堆。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_HEAP_TIER_2
entities.description: 值为2，表示堆可以支持所有三种资源类别（缓冲区、非RT/DS纹理、RT/DS纹理）。在第2层中，这些资源类别可以混合在同一堆中。应用程序可以创建允许所有三类资源的堆，但不是必需的。支持第1层的应用程序可以在第2层无缝运行。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由D3D12_FEATURE_DATA_D3D12_OPTIONS结构的ResourceHeapTier成员使用，用于指定硬件和驱动程序支持的资源堆层。较低层需要更多的堆归属。资源分为三类：缓冲区、非渲染目标/非深度模具纹理、渲染目标或深度模具纹理。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_VERTEX_AND_CONSTANT_BUFFER
entities.description: Value: 0x1. The subresource must be in this state when the GPU accesses it as a vertex buffer or constant buffer. This is a read-only state.

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_DEPTH_WRITE
entities.description: 表示资源处于深度写入状态，该状态与其他状态互斥

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_STREAM_OUT
entities.description: 值： 0x100 资源与流输出一起使用。 当 3D 管道作为流出目标访问子资源时，子资源必须处于此状态。 这是一种只写状态。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_INDIRECT_ARGUMENT
entities.description: Value: 0x200. Resource is used as indirect argument. When a subresource is used as parameter buffer passed to indirect drawing method ID3D12GraphicsCommandList::ExecuteIndirect, the subresource must be in this state. This is a read-only state.

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_COPY_DEST
entities.description: 资源状态常量，表示该资源可作为复制操作的目标

return_value.description: 无

entities.remarks: 当资源处于此状态时，可用作复制操作的目标位置。源资源必须处于D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_COPY_SOURCE状态。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_COPY_SOURCE
entities.description: 资源用作复制操作中的源。当子资源用作复制操作或BLT操作的源时，它们必须处于此状态。这是只读状态。值为0x800。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_RESOLVE_DEST
entities.description: 资源用作解析操作中的目标。值为0x1000。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_RESOLVE_SOURCE
entities.description: 值： 0x2000 资源用作解析操作中的源。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_SHADING_RATE_SOURCE
entities.description: 值：0x1000000。从Windows 10版本1903开始(10.0;内部版本18362)，指示资源是用于可变速率着色(VRS)的屏幕空间着色率图像。有关详细信息，请参阅可变速率着色(VRS)。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_PRESENT
entities.description: Resource state indicating the resource is ready to be presented to the display.

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_VIDEO_DECODE_READ
entities.description: Value: 0x10000. Specifies the resource is used as a source in video decode operations, including reading compressed bitstreams and decoding reference frames.

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_VIDEO_DECODE_WRITE
entities.description: 资源用作视频解码操作中的写入目标。此状态用于解码输出和直方图。值为0x20000。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_VIDEO_PROCESS_READ
entities.description: 值为0x40000，表示资源在视频处理期间用于读取视频数据（例如在视频编码/压缩等处理操作中作为源使用）

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_VIDEO_PROCESS_WRITE
entities.description: 资源用于在视频处理期间写入视频数据；即资源用作处理操作（如视频编码/压缩）的目标。值为 0x80000。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_VIDEO_ENCODE_READ
entities.description: 资源用作编码操作中的源。此状态用于运动估计的输入和引用。值为0x200000。

entities.name: D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_VIDEO_ENCODE_WRITE
entities.description: Value: 0x800000. This resource is used as a destination in encode operations. This state is used for resolving motion vector heap operation target textures.
entities.remarks: This enumeration is used by the following methods:

entities.name: DEPTH_READ
entities.description: 可以与其他状态组合的状态。当子资源位于只读深度模具视图中时使用

entities.name: D3D12_SRV_DIMENSION_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE
entities.description: Specifies the dimension type for ray tracing acceleration structure shader resource views. Resources intended for D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE state must be created in this state and cannot transition out. Resources not created in this state cannot transition into it.
entities.remarks: These values are used by the D3D12_SHADER_RESOURCE_VIEW_DESC structure.

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_CONSTANTS
entities.description: Defines constants data for D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER structure. Used when D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE is set to D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_32BIT_CONSTANTS.
entities.syntax:
typedef struct D3D12_ROOT_CONSTANTS {
UINT ShaderRegister;   UINT RegisterSpace;   UINT Num32BitValues;} D3D12_ROOT_CONSTANTS;

entities.name: ShaderRegister
entities.description: Specifies the shader register number in HLSL binding syntax. Used with RegisterSpace parameter to map between shader resources and runtime heap descriptors in root signature data structures. Example: In HLSL 'Texture2D<float4> a : register(t2, space3)', ShaderRegister would be 2 (indicating SRV type) and RegisterSpace would be 3. Register space is optional with default value 0.
entities.remarks: 将此结构与 D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_DESC 结构一起使用。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_32BIT_CONSTANTS
entities.description: Specifies 32-bit constants as the root parameter type. Use D3D12_ROOT_CONSTANTS structure when declaring members.

entities.name: CD3DX12_ROOT_CONSTANTS
entities.description: Direct3D 12 helper structure for creating root signatures with inline constants

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR
entities.description: Defines a descriptor in the root signature. Used as a member of D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER when its ParameterType is set to D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR.

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_SRV
entities.description: Specifies a shader resource view (SRV) root parameter type. When used with D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_UAV, use D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR1.
entities.remarks: This enumeration is used by D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER structure.

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_FLAGS
entities.description: Flags for root descriptor compatibility with older operating systems. Useful for generating compatible root signatures but may lose optimization opportunities.
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_FLAGS {   D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_FLAG_NONE = 0,

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_FLAG_DATA_VOLATILE
entities.description: Specifies that the data is volatile (value: 0x2). Equivalent to root signature version 1.0.

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_FLAG_DATA_STATIC_WHILE_SET_AT_EXECUTE
entities.description: 值为0x4，表示描述符数据在执行期间设置时保持静态

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_FLAG_DATA_STATIC
entities.description: 值为0x8，表示数据是静态的，提供驱动程序优化的最佳潜力。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR1 结构使用。 若要指定描述符和数据的波动性，请参阅 D3D12_DESCRIPTOR_RANGE_FLAGS。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: 值：0，默认假设针对SRV/CBV：DATA_STATIC_WHILE_SET_AT_EXECUTE的数据，对于UAV：DATA_VOLATILE。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE
entities.description: Defines the descriptor table type for D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER. When ParameterType member of D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER is set to D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE, this structure specifies the descriptor ranges.
entities.syntax:
typedef struct D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE {
UINT                         NumDescriptorRanges;   const D3D12_DESCRIPTOR_RANGE *pDescriptorRanges;} D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE;

entities.name: NumDescriptorRanges
entities.description: 指定表布局中描述符范围的数目。pDescriptorRanges 参数指向描述描述符范围的 D3D12_DESCRIPTOR_RANGE1 结构数组。
entities.remarks: 不允许在同一描述符表中混合使用采样器与常量缓冲区视图(CBV)、无序访问视图(UAV)、着色器资源视图(SRV)。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE1
entities.description: 描述描述符表布局的结构，包含描述符范围的集合，这些描述符范围在描述符堆中连续排列。
entities.syntax:
typedef struct D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE1 {
UINT                          NumDescriptorRanges;   const D3D12_DESCRIPTOR_RANGE1 *pDescriptorRanges;} D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE1;
entities.remarks: 将此结构与 D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_DESC1 结构一起使用。 请参阅帮助程序结构 CD3DX12_ROOT_PARAMETER1。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE
entities.description: Specifies a descriptor table parameter type in a root signature. For newer versions, use D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE1. See helper structure CD3DX12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE1.

entities.name: D3D12_SHADER_VISIBILITY
entities.description: Specifies the shader stages that can access a root signature element.
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_SHADER_VISIBILITY {   D3D12_SHADER_VISIBILITY_ALL = 0,

members.name: ParameterType
members.description: 一个D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE类型的值，用于指定根签名槽的类型。 此成员确定 在以下联合中使用的类型。 DescriptorTable 一种D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR_TABLE结构，将描述符表的布局描述为描述符堆中一个 接一个出现的描述符范围的集合。 Constants 一种D3D12_ROOT_CONSTANTS结构，用于描述在着色器中显示为一个常量缓冲区的根签 名中的内联常量。 Descriptor 一个D3D12_ROOT_DESCRIPTOR结构，用于描述着色器中显示的根签名中的内联描述符。

entities.name: ShaderVisibility
entities.description: 指定可以访问根签名槽内容的着色器类型的枚举值

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER1
entities.description: Defines the root signature parameters for Direct3D 12.
entities.syntax: typedef struct D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER1 {

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_CBV
entities.description: Constant value for CBV (Constant Buffer View) root parameter type in D3D12

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_ALLOW_INPUT_ASSEMBLER_INPUT_LAYOUT
entities.description: 值为0x1，表示允许使用输入汇编器并要求输入布局定义顶点缓冲区绑定。省略此标志可节省根参数空间，但优化效果较小。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_DENY_VERTEX_SHADER_ROOT_ACCESS
entities.description: Specifies that vertex shaders cannot access the root signature.

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_DENY_GEOMETRY_SHADER_ROOT_ACCESS
entities.description: Specifies that geometry shaders cannot access the root signature.

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_ALLOW_STREAM_OUTPUT
entities.description: 值为0x40。指定允许使用流输出。省略此标志可节省根参数空间，但优化效果较小。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_DENY_AMPLIFICATION_SHADER_ROOT_ACCESS
entities.description: Specifies that amplification shader root access is denied in the root signature.

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_CBV_SRV_UAV_HEAP_DIRECTLY_INDEXED
entities.description: 值： 0x400 允许着色器使用 ResourceDescriptorHeap 内置变量直接为 CBV/SRV/UAV 描述符堆编制索引。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_SAMPLER_HEAP_DIRECTLY_INDEXED
entities.description: 值： 0x800 允许着色器使用 SamplerDescriptorHeap 内置变量直接为采样器描述符堆编制索引。
entities.remarks: 此枚举在 D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_DESC 结构中使用。拒绝访问着色器阶段的值在某些硬件上是次要优化。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_NONE
entities.description: Specifies no additional root signature flags. Value: 0 indicates default behavior.

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_DENY_HULL_SHADER_ROOT_ACCESS
entities.description: 值为0x4，表示拒绝外壳着色器访问根签名

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_DENY_DOMAIN_SHADER_ROOT_ACCESS
entities.description: Specifies that domain shader access to the root signature is denied (value: 0x8).

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_DENY_PIXEL_SHADER_ROOT_ACCESS
entities.description: 值为0x20，表示拒绝像素着色器访问根签名。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_LOCAL_ROOT_SIGNATURE
entities.description: 值：0x80。根签名与光线追踪着色器一起使用，以定义源自着色器表中的着色器记录的资源绑定。此标志不能与图形管道相关的任何其他根签名标志组合使用。缺少标志意味着根签名可用于图形或计算，其中计算版本也与光线跟踪的全局根签名共享。

entities.name: D3D12_ROOT_SIGNATURE_FLAG_DENY_MESH_SHADER_ROOT_ACCESS
entities.description: 值为0x200，表示拒绝网格着色器访问根签名。

entities.name: D3D12_SHADER_VISIBILITY_ALL
entities.description: Indicates that the root signature should be broadcast to all shader stages. Access denial may override this rule to save hardware work for simple shaders that don't require root signature resources.

entities.name: D3D12_RT_FORMAT_ARRAY
entities.description: 包装呈现器目标格式数组的结构体，用于定义多个连续呈现目标的格式。
entities.syntax:
struct D3D12_RT_FORMAT_ARRAY {   DXGI_FORMAT RTFormats[8];
UINT        NumRenderTargets;};
entities.remarks: 此结构主要用于创建包含多个连续呈现目标格式说明的管道状态流说明。

members.name: RTFormats[8]
members.description: 指定DXGI_FORMAT值的固定大小数组，这些值定义最多 8 个呈现目标的格式。 NumRenderTargets 指定数组中存储的呈现目标格式的数目。

entities.name: D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION_TEXTURE1DARRAY
entities.description: Specifies a 1D texture array resource in a render target view.

entities.name: D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION_TEXTURE2DARRAY
entities.description: 值：5，资源将作为2D纹理数组进行访问。

entities.name: D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION_TEXTURE2DMSARRAY
entities.description: Specifies the resource will be accessed as a 2D texture array with multisampling. Value: 7

entities.name: D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION_TEXTURE3D
entities.description: Specifies that the resource will be accessed as a 3D texture. Value: 8
entities.remarks: 在 D3D12_RENDER_TARGET_VIEW_DESC 结构的 ViewDimension 成员中指定此枚举中的 值之一。

entities.name: D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION_UNKNOWN
entities.description: 值为0。请勿使用此值，因为这将导致ID3D12Device::CreateRenderTargetView失败。

entities.name: D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION_BUFFER
entities.description: Specifies that the resource will be accessed as a buffer. Value: 1

entities.name: D3D12_RTV_DIMENSION_TEXTURE2D
entities.description: 值为4，表示资源将作为2D纹理进行访问。

entities.name: D3D12_SAMPLER_DESC
entities.description: Describes sampler state.
entities.syntax: typedef struct D3D12_SAMPLER_DESC {   D3D12_FILTER               Filter;

entities.name: D3D12_TEXTURE_ADDRESS_MODE
entities.description: Specifies the texture addressing mode for texture sampling operations.
entities.syntax: typedef enum D3D12_TEXTURE_ADDRESS_MODE {

members.name: Filter
members.description: 一个D3D12_FILTER类型的值，指定采样纹理时要使用的筛选方法。 AddressU 一个D3D12_TEXTURE_ADDRESS_MODE类型的值，指定用于解析超出 0 到 1 范围的 u 纹 理坐标的方法。 AddressV 一个D3D12_TEXTURE_ADDRESS_MODE类型的值，指定用于解析 0 到 1 范围之外的 v 纹 理坐标的方法。 AddressW 一个D3D12_TEXTURE_ADDRESS_MODE类型的值，该值指定要用于解析超出 0 到 1 范围 的 w 纹理坐标的方法。 MipLODBias 与计算的 mipmap 级别的偏移量。 例如，如果运行时计算纹理应在 mipmap 级别 3 采 样， 而 MipLODBias 为 2，则将在 mipmap 级别 5 对纹理进行采样。 MaxAnisotropy 如果在 Filter 中指定了D3D12_FILTER_ANISOTROPIC或

entities.name: D3D12_TEXTURE_ADDRESS_MODE_BORDER
entities.description: Specifies that texture coordinates outside the range [0,1] should be set to a border color. The RGBA border color must be between 0.0 and 1.0 (inclusive).
entities.remarks: Used by D3D12_SAMPLER_DESC structure and CreateSampler method.

entities.name: D3D12_SAMPLER_FEEDBACK_TIER_NOT_SUPPORTED
entities.description: 值为0，表示设备不支持采样器反馈功能。调用采样器反馈API将返回错误。

entities.name: D3D12_SAMPLER_FEEDBACK_TIER_0_9
entities.description: 值为90，指定支持第0.9层的采样器反馈。支持特性包括：采用D3D12_TEXTURE_ADDRESS_MODE_WRAP和D3D12_TEXTURE_ADDRESS_MODE_CLAMP纹理寻址模式的采样器支持采样器反馈。传递给反馈写入HLSL方法的Texture2D着色器资源视图有以下限制：MostDetailedMip字段必须为0；MipLevels计数必须跨越资源的完整mip计数；PlaneSlice字段必须为0；ResourceMinLODClamp字段必须为0。Texture2DArray着色器资源视图还需满足：FirstArraySlice字段必须为0。

entities.name: D3D12_SAMPLER_FEEDBACK_TIER_1_0
entities.description: 值：100，指定第1.0层支持采样器反馈。表明所有纹理寻址模式都支持采样器反馈，并且无论传入的着色器资源视图如何，都支持反馈写入方法。

entities.name: HING_IDENTIFIER
entities.description: 描述序列化加速结构的驱动程序版本控制的不透明数据结构。将此结构传递到ID3D12Device5::CheckDriverMatchingIdentifier调用中，以确定以前序列化的加速结构是否与当前驱动程序/设备兼容。

entities.name: DriverOpaqueGUID
entities.description: 驱动程序的不透明标识符

entities.name: D3D12_SERIALIZED_DATA_RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE
entities.description: 表示序列化的光线跟踪加速结构数据。

entities.name: SerializedSizeInBytesIncludingHeader
entities.description: 返回序列化数据的总大小（包括头部）

entities.name: DeserializedSizeInBytes
entities.description: 指定反序列化加速结构时将使用的内存大小。此值小于或等于序列化前的原始加速结构大小。

entities.name: NumBottomLevelAccelerationStructurePointersAfterHeader
